title: rufacer rubrum
intro: Rufacer rubrum, commonly known as the Red Sandalwood, is a species of tree in the Santalaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal and spiritual properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine. The health benefits of Rufacer rubrum include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which can aid in reducing stress, improving sleep, and protecting against diseases. The therapeutic actions of the plant's bioactive constituents, including santalol and sesquiterpenes, can also help to reduce pain, improve digestion, and promote relaxation.
parts: Rufacer rubrum has many medicinal parts, such as its roots, which are known to contain alkaloids like berberine and palmatine, exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves are rich in flavonoids, including quercetin and kaempferol, which have been shown to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The flowers of Rufacer rubrum are rich in essential oils, including flavonoid glycosides and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues and promote relaxation. Additionally, the plant's rhizomes contain sesquiterpenes, such as furanosesquiterpenes, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
